input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 62 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "neuro", "count": 8, "message": "8 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}, {"category": "respiratory", "count": 13, "message": "13 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "cardiac", "count": 6, "message": "6 cardiac patients incoming", "protocol": "Pre-alert cath lab \u2014 multiple cardiac presentations"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 12, "message": "12 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 6, "message": "6 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}, {"category": "general", "count": 7, "message": "7 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}, {"category": "injury", "count": 5, "message": "5 injury patients incoming", "protocol": "Mass casualty protocol consideration"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 5, "message": "5 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": null, "current_utilization": 103, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "St. Michael's Hospital", "facility_id": "st-michaels", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to St. Michael's Hospital (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "SickKids Hospital", "facility_id": "sickkids", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to SickKids Hospital (0% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Immediately activate protocols for critical incoming patient clusters: Stroke Code readiness for 8 neuro, consider isolation for 13 respiratory, pre-alert cath lab for 6 cardiac, infection control for 12 GI, mass casualty consideration for 5 injury, and crisis team for 5 mental health patients. Given current 103% utilization, divert all CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH or St. Michael's to optimize flow and ensure patient safety.
